description:
lib/map

 responsibility:
This directory contains the mappers for the Hadoop MapReduce architecture. Mappers are responsible for processing the input data and transforming it into a format that can be processed by the reducers.

collaboration:
The mappers in this directory collaborate by passing data to each other and by sharing information about the input data.

architectural role/pattern:
The mappers in this directory follow the MapReduce pattern, which is a distributed processing framework for large data sets. The MapReduce pattern separates the task of processing data into two main phases: the map phase and the reduce phase. The mappers in this directory are responsible for the map phase, which involves transforming the input data into a format that can be processed by the reducers.
